item.title: The truth behind the Brendan Santo case
item.description: The mysterious disappearance of Brendan Santo raises haunting questions and troubling truths.

media:content.media:title: The truth behind the Brendan Santo case
media:content.media:description: The mysterious disappearance of Brendan Santo raises haunting questions and troubling truths.

item.title: One Step Closer To Justice For The 19-Year-Old
item.description: A long-awaited breakthrough brings hope in the search for justice for the 19-year-old victim.

media:content.media:title: One Step Closer To Justice For The 19-Year-Old
media:content.media:description: A long-awaited breakthrough brings hope in the search for justice for the 19-year-old victim.

item.title: Small Town SHOOK by The Case Of Glenn Kopitske!
item.description: A quiet small town is left stunned as the disturbing case of Glenn Kopitske begins to unravel.

media:content.media:title: Small Town SHOOK by The Case Of Glenn Kopitske!
media:content.media:description: A quiet small town is left stunned as the disturbing case of Glenn Kopitske begins to unravel.

item.title: She Wanted a Divorce, So He Ended Her Life?
item.description: A troubled relationship turns tragic in a story where love may have led to something far darker

media:content.media:title: She Wanted a Divorce, So He Ended Her Life?
media:content.media:description: A troubled relationship turns tragic in a story where love may have led to something far darker
